{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent provides detailed critiques and recommendations that directly address the claims made in the paragraph, ensuring a thorough audit of evidence.",
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies specific prior works (Su et al., Mathur & Tippenhauer) and contrasts them with the current work, highlighting the unique contributions.",
    "RX.1": "The agent clearly marks uncertainties by identifying areas where more information is needed, such as threshold selection and evaluation protocol details.",
    "RX.3": "The agent's recommendations cover all aspects of the paragraph without any drift from the original scope.",
    "RX.4": "The output does not introduce new errors or harmful content; it only provides constructive criticism.",
    "RX.5": "Every recommendation is well-justified and clearly marked, providing a detailed rationale for each point."
  },

  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.3: The agent provides detailed critiques and recommendations that directly address the claims made in the paragraph, ensuring a thorough audit of evidence.
rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies specific prior works (Su et al., Mathur & Tippenhauer) and contrasts them with the current work, highlighting the unique contributions.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks uncertainties by identifying areas where more information is needed, such as threshold selection and evaluation protocol details.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's recommendations cover all aspects of the paragraph without any drift from the original scope.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors or harmful content; it only provides constructive criticism.
rationale.RX.5: Every recommendation is well-justified and clearly marked, providing a detailed rationale for each point.
